visual_description: A man with a bald head, wearing a dark jacket, stands with his back to the camera, looking at a wall of aquariums filled with fish. The scene then cuts to a man in a green suit and a checkered tie smiling as he walks into a room, followed by a woman in a red and black patterned dress. The woman looks to her right with a neutral expression.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a foreign language, followed by a loud, dramatic musical sting.
